file_insights.purpose: Tracks completed specs in wave execution
Explains QA rejection and manual verification requirements
key_insights: Code is correct but Nu integration tests blocked by policy
Provides exact commands for manual verification
Clearly separates code defects from environmental limitations

file_insights.purpose: Tracks acceptance criteria, checks, and QA signoff
key_changes: qa_signoff now contains rejected status with detailed verification_blocked issues
qa_stats added to track rejection patterns

key_insights: subtask-1-2, 1-3, 1-4 now marked completed with session timestamps
Each subtask tracks approach, success status, and errors

file_insights.modifications: Updated to handle next wave after spec 004 completion

patterns_discovered.context: Multi-spec projects execute in waves with isolated jj workspaces
patterns_discovered.evidence: dispatch-state.json tracks completed/failed/skipped; each spec has dedicated directory

patterns_discovered.context: Automated checks (tests, clippy, fmt) separate from integration tests that require manual execution
patterns_discovered.evidence: QA rejected spec 004 not for code quality but for Nu policy blocking; created QA_FIX_REQUEST.md for user follow-up

patterns_discovered.context: Each session stores insights in session_insights/sessionN.json with attempt tracking
patterns_discovered.evidence: attempt_history.json maintains per-subtask completion status across sessions 1-8

patterns_discovered.context: Acceptance criteria split into automated (make check) and manual (Nu integration tests)
patterns_discovered.evidence: implementation_plan.json marks different verification steps as completed/blocked/manual

gotchas_discovered.issue: Nu commands blocked in Auto-Claude environment
gotchas_discovered.impact: Integration tests cannot execute automatically; requires manual verification
gotchas_discovered.workaround: QA_FIX_REQUEST.md provides exact shell commands for user to run outside Auto-Claude
gotchas_discovered.prevention: Document command execution policies for each tool in project memory

gotchas_discovered.issue: Code quality verification vs integration test verification
gotchas_discovered.impact: Testing passes (428 tests, clippy clean, fmt clean) but integration cannot verify due to policy
gotchas_discovered.insight: QA rejection does not indicate code defect; environmental constraint
gotchas_discovered.lesson: Separate verification types in QA workflow to avoid confusion

gotchas_discovered.issue: Spec 005 added to completed before manual verification of spec 004
gotchas_discovered.impact: Wave advancement may outpace manual verification feedback
gotchas_discovered.risk: If spec 004 manual verification fails, subsequent specs may need rollback
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Maintain session insights and build_commits.json to enable rollback per spec

approach_outcome.objective: Verify bop logs command exists and works correctly
execution_summary: All automated checks passed: 428 tests, clippy clean, fmt clean
approach_outcome.qa_reason: Integration test execution blocked by Nu policy; manual verification required
artifacts_created: QA_FIX_REQUEST.md - explains rejection and provides runnable commands
Updated implementation_plan.json with qa_signoff and iteration history
approach_outcome.next_steps: User must run: nu --no-config-file scripts/test-real-adapters.nu --adapter codex --timeout 120

recommendations.recommendation: Document command execution policies (Nu, bash, cargo) in project memory or spec template
recommendations.rationale: Prevents future specs from hitting unexpected policy blocks

recommendations.recommendation: Formalize separation between automated verification (code quality) and manual verification (integration tests)
recommendations.rationale: Reduces confusion when QA rejects due to environmental vs code issues

recommendations.recommendation: Defer marking spec completed until manual verification feedback received
recommendations.rationale: Enables rollback if manual verification discovers issues

recommendations.recommendation: Use session_insights/ and attempt_history.json to track cross-session dependencies
recommendations.rationale: Enables recovery from session interruptions and multi-agent coordination

recommendations.recommendation: Expand qa_iteration_history to include user feedback and retest outcomes
recommendations.rationale: Creates audit trail for QA decisions and enables learning from rejections
